text.tspan: BREAKING NEWS
@unhappychoice teaches splashboard to read 5 manifest formats. Cargo.toml trembles.
ABSOLUTE CARNAGE
@unhappychoice merges 50 PRs in 7 days. Dependabot reportedly exhausted.
JUST IN
@unhappychoice drops 823 lines of new Rust on a Wednesday. No survivors.
UNPRECEDENTED
@unhappychoice reviews PRs across 5 orgs simultaneously. Witnesses baffled.
DEVELOPING
@unhappychoice hits 75 commits on Tuesday alone. Keyboard requests hazard pay.
SOURCES SAY
@unhappychoice bumps Anthropic SDK 5 minor versions at once. Bold strategy.
NOT A DRILL
@unhappychoice ships GitHub Enterprise support to splashboard mid-dep-sprint.
EXPERTS BAFFLED
@unhappychoice posts 225 commits with zero rest days. Sleep status: unknown.
